headline: Ulta Beauty Expands Exclusive Brands To Deepen Loyalty And Promotion Impact
summary: Ulta Beauty (NasdaqGS:ULTA) is rolling out Hairstory into more than 300 stores as a new exclusive brand partnership. The company is adding NassifMD Skincare to its UB Marketplace, expanding its dermatologist led and science focused offerings. Ulta is running its 21 Days of Beauty event, a multi week promotion that puts daily deals in front of shoppers across key categories. Ulta Beauty, a major specialty beauty retailer in the US, continues to build out its brand roster and e commerce...

headline: Micron To Rally Around 42%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
